input:
{"command": "python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with ZipFile(p) as z:
    names=z.namelist()
    for n in ['[Content_Types].xml','_rels/.rels','xl/workbook.xml','xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels','xl/styles.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml']:
        ET.fromstring(z.read(n))
    sheet3 = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml').decode('utf-8')
    sheet4 = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print('xml_ok', True)
    print('failure_count_cached_3', '<c r="B11"' in sheet3 and '<v>3</v>' in sheet3)
    print('ape_r1_cached', '0.5660377358490566' in sheet3)
    print('within_budget_count', sheet4.count('within_budget'))
PY"}
label: positive

raw_step.causal_note: checks numeric correctness and deliverable existence

input.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with ZipFile(p) as z:
    names=z.namelist()
    for n in ['[Content_Types].xml','_rels/.rels','xl/workbook.xml','xl/_rels/workbook.xml.rels','xl/styles.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml']:
        ET.fromstring(z.read(n))
    sheet3 = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml').decode('utf-8')
    sheet4 = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print('xml_ok', True)
    print('failure_count_cached_3', '<c r="B11"' in sheet3 and '<v>3</v>' in sheet3)
    print('ape_r1_cached', '0.5660377358490566' in sheet3)
    print('within_budget_count', sheet4.count('within_budget'))
PY
